name: 海豹短刀（★） | 狩猎网格
nameZh: 海豹短刀（★） | 狩猎网格
descriptionEn: A classic of the Counter-Strike series, the edge of this knife is press-fit Stellite perfectly held in place due to its precise fit with the titanium on the blade's cheek and spine. The handle is fossilized mastodon ivory held in a carbon fibre pocket. It has been spray-painted using mesh fencing and cardboard cutouts as stencils. A predator is a predator, no matter the environment
descriptionZh: 作为反恐精英系列的经典物品，这把刀的刀锋由钴基合金压制，与钛制刀片、龙骨精准结合。整把刀浑然一体。握柄采用了碳纤维包裹的石化乳齿象牙。 这把武器以围住的网格和纸板切口为漏字板进行了喷漆。 不管环境怎么变，弱肉强食的法则永远不会改变
